name: Koa Pancake House
tagline: Old-school Kaneohe breakfast spot where retirees, surfers, and families all converge over macadamia nut pancakes.
mustOrder: Macadamia nut pancakes — fluffy stacks topped with mac nut syrup
Portuguese sausage, eggs, and rice — the local breakfast standard
Dutch baby pancake — puffy oven-baked pancake with powdered sugar and lemon
parking: Windward Mall parking lot. Plenty of spaces.
talkStory: A Windward Side breakfast institution inside Windward Mall in Kaneohe — don't let the mall food court location fool you. The macadamia nut pancakes with mac nut syrup are legendary among Kaneohe locals, and the Dutch baby (puffy oven-baked pancake with powdered sugar and lemon) is the insider order. The crowd is mostly retirees, surfers, and local families who've been coming for years. Opens early, closes mid-afternoon. If you're heading to Kaneohe or the Windward coast, this is the breakfast move.
